**Source repository**
Link: https://github.com/...

**Why add this source?**
What skills does it provide? Why is it valuable?

**Quality check**
- [ ] Has 50+ stars
- [ ] Contains 3+ SKILL.md files
- [ ] Has an OSS license
- [ ] No suspicious code patterns
